title: Code Index — orchestrator-core
content:
Module: orchestrator-core
Language: Kotlin 2.3.20
Platform: JVM 21
Purpose: Shared library with domain models, configuration DTOs, sealed exception hierarchy, and utility functions.

Key Files:
- ConfigurationManager.kt — Interface for config loading
- InfraConfig.kt — Infrastructure configuration DTOs
- OrchestratorConfig.kt — @Serializable config data classes
- ErrorCodes.kt — MCP JSON-RPC error codes
- Exceptions.kt — Sealed exception hierarchy (McpOrchestratorException)
- ToolDefinition.kt — ToolDefinition + ToolEntry domain models
- RetryUtils.kt — Exponential backoff retry utility

Exception Hierarchy: McpOrchestratorException (sealed) → InvalidParamsException, ToolNotFoundException, ServerUnavailableException, ExecutionTimeoutException, UpstreamErrorException, VectorDbUnavailableException, EmbeddingServiceException, ConfigException, GenericMcpException

title: Code Index — orchestrator-client
content:
Module: orchestrator-client
Language: Kotlin 2.3.20
Platform: JVM 21
Purpose: Client-side services for upstream MCP connections, embedding generation, and vector DB operations.

Key Services:
- EmbeddingService (interface) → OpenAiEmbeddingService, OllamaEmbeddingService, LmStudioEmbeddingService
- UpstreamServerManager → manages stdio/HTTP connections to upstream MCP servers
- McpConnection (interface) → StdioMcpConnection, HttpMcpConnection
- HealthMonitor — periodic health checks + auto-reconnect
- VectorDbClient (interface) → QdrantVectorDbClient, PgVectorDbClient, FaissVectorDbClient
- DatabaseFactory — HikariCP DataSource factory
- DatabaseInitializer — Schema initialization

Patterns: Strategy (multiple embedding/vector DB providers), Interface/Impl, Health Monitoring
tags: code-index, orchestrator-client, kotlin, embedding, vector-db, upstream

title: Code Index — orchestrator-server
content:
Module: orchestrator-server
Language: Kotlin 2.3.20
Platform: JVM 21
Purpose: Main MCP orchestrator server — tool discovery, execution, Jira sync, KB store, graph visualization, dashboard.

Key Packages (30+):
- config: ConfigurationManager, ConfigDbSyncService, ConfigValidator
- discovery: ToolDiscoveryService (semantic + keyword search)
- execution: ToolExecutionDispatcher
- protocol: McpServerFactory, McpToolRegistrar, JsonRpcHandler
- registry: ToolRegistry, ToolIndexer
- transport: StdioTransport, HttpStreamableTransport, KtorSseServerTransport
- sync: SyncStateManager, TicketCacheRepository, TicketGraphRepository
- scanner: ProjectScanner, JqlBuilder, PageFetcher, BatchUpserter
- crawler: TicketCrawler, AdfParser, KBIngestor, GraphBuilder
- dashboard: SyncDashboardService, SyncEventBus (SSE)
- graph: GraphService, GraphDataRepository, ViewModeStrategy (Hierarchy/Dependency/Team)
- security: RLS, RoleContextService, PII/BR masking
- attachment: AttachmentProcessor, TextExtractor (PDF, DOCX)
- ocr: OcrService
- segmentation: ContentSegmentationService (LangChain4j)
- queue: DualPriorityQueue, QueueWorker, CrashRecoveryService
- promotion: SmartToolPromoter
- fileproxy: FileProxyService, WrapperToolGenerator
- usermanagement: User CRUD, roles, routes

UI Pages:
- graph-viewer.html: 3D force-directed graph (3d-force-graph library), 3 view modes
- sync-dashboard.html: Real-time sync dashboard (SSE)

API Endpoints:
- POST /mcp — MCP Streamable HTTP
- GET /sync/graph/{projectKey}?view={hierarchy|dependency|team}
- GET /sync/graph/{projectKey}/{issueKey}?depth=N
- GET /sync/live — SSE stream
- POST /sync/start, POST /sync/stop
- GET /sync/status/{projectKey}

Dependencies: orchestrator-core, orchestrator-client, Ktor Server/Client, MCP SDK, Koin, PostgreSQL, PDFBox, POI, LangChain4j
tags: code-index, orchestrator-server, kotlin, mcp, jira-sync, graph, dashboard, ui

title: Code Index — orchestrator-bridge
content:
Module: orchestrator-bridge
Language: Kotlin 2.3.20
Platform: JVM 21
Purpose: Bridge between IDE (Kiro/VS Code) and orchestrator server. Runs as local MCP server (stdio) forwarding to orchestrator (HTTP Streamable).

Key Files:
- BridgeApplication.kt — Entry point
- BridgeServer.kt — MCP server for IDE
- BridgeToolPromoter.kt — Cache frequently-used tools
- HttpStreamableClient.kt — HTTP client to orchestrator
- FileTransferHandler.kt — File transfer IDE↔server
- HealthCheckManager.kt — Monitor orchestrator health
- ReconnectionManager.kt — Auto-reconnect
- LocalEmbedImagesTool.kt — embed_images (local)
- LocalStreamWriteTool.kt — stream_write_file (local)
- ImageEmbedder.kt — Base64 image embedding
- WorkspaceContext.kt — IDE workspace context

Architecture: IDE ──stdio──> Bridge ──HTTP Streamable──> Orchestrator Server
Local tools execute without server roundtrip: embed_images, stream_write_file, export_drawio
tags: code-index, orchestrator-bridge, kotlin, bridge, ide, local-tools

title: Code Index — kb-server
content:
Module: kb-server
Language: Kotlin 2.3.20
Platform: JVM 21
Purpose: Standalone Knowledge Base server with MCP tools for ingesting and searching content.

Key Packages:
- config: KbConfig, KbConfigLoader
- protocol: KbMcpServerFactory, KbToolRegistrar, KbToolHandler
- transport: KbHttpTransport (HTTP + static + graph)
- store: KB storage (database, encryption, vector, repository)
- queue: DualPriorityQueue, QueueWorker, CrashRecoveryService
- masking: PiiDetector, PiiMaskingEngine
- graph: GraphService, GraphDataRepository, GraphRoutes (same as orchestrator-server)

MCP Tools:
- kb_ingest: Ingest content (PII mask → segment → embed → index)
- kb_search: Semantic search with RLS filtering

Content Pipeline: Ingest → PII Detection → Masking → Segmentation (LangChain4j) → Embedding (OpenAI/Ollama) → Vector Indexing (pgvector)

HTTP Endpoints: /mcp, /sync/graph/{project}, /sync/graph-viewer, /health

Dependencies: orchestrator-core, orchestrator-client, Ktor Client, MCP SDK, Koin, PostgreSQL + pgvector
tags: code-index, kb-server, kotlin, knowledge-base, vector-search, pii-masking

title: Code Index — UI Components (Graph Viewer + Sync Dashboard)
content:
UI Pages in MCP Orchestrator project.

## Graph Viewer (graph-viewer.html)
Location: orchestrator-server + kb-server static resources
Technology: Vanilla JS + 3d-force-graph (Three.js-based 3D rendering)
Features:
- 3D force-directed graph of Jira issues
- 3 view modes: Hierarchy (color by type), Dependency (color by status), Team (color by assignee)
- Node click → details panel (summary, type, status, priority)
- Node hover → highlight connected nodes/edges
- Search → camera fly-to
- Auto-generated legend + stats bar
API: GET /sync/graph/{projectKey}?view={hierarchy|dependency|team}

Current Limitations:
- No filtering (status, type, priority, sprint, label)
- No timeline/sprint view, no Kanban board
- No node grouping/clustering
- No export (PNG, SVG)
- No minimap, no zoom controls UI
- No dark/light theme toggle
- Minimal details panel (no Jira links, no sub-tasks)
- No real-time updates
- No multi-project view
- No critical path visualization

## Sync Dashboard (sync-dashboard.html)
Location: orchestrator-server static resources
Technology: Vanilla JS + Server-Sent Events (SSE)
Features:
- Real-time sync progress via SSE (/sync/live)
- Start/Stop sync buttons
- Progress bar + percentage
- Status cards: Status, Synced Issues, Last Sync
- Queue badges: Pending, Processing, Completed, Failed
- Event log (50 entries)
- WebSocket indicator + polling fallback

Current Limitations:
- Single project at a time
- No historical data/charts
- No attachment progress details
- No configuration UI
- No multi-project overview
tags: code-index, ui, graph-viewer, sync-dashboard, frontend, javascript, 3d-force-graph
